subcodes.first_line: O my Lord, my Lord! Exalted and glorified art Thou beyond my praise and commendation, sanctified and purged art Thou from my descriptions and attributes; verily, tongues have faltered [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ربی ربی تقدست و تعالیت عن ذکری و ثناای و تنزهت عن محامدی و نعوتی قد کلت السن
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
